prompt: Render a detailed image of a fluffy cat on sofa using the grayscale reference as a depth map, highlighting the volume and texture derived from the depth information against a dark background in a realistic computer graphics style.
prompt_refined: Generate a realistic computer graphics (CGI) image of a fluffy cat, prominently seated on a sofa. Use image 1 as a depth map to accurately define the cat's three-dimensional volume and the intricate contours of its fur. The rendering should emphasize the soft texture and fluffy appearance derived from the depth information, set against a dark background.
